docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DRUMMOND, EILEAN AS TO DEFENDANT HOM, BEATRICE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,400.00 FILED BY DRUMMOND, EILEAN AS TO DEFENDANT HOM, BEATRICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-25-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
COPYING FEES (1 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DRUMMOND, EILEAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-17-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOM, BEATRICE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-16-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-16-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-28-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF EILEAN DRUMMOND IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BEATRICE HOM IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS: HARRY HOM. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT OF A $1375 PAYMENT TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE MAY-28TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
